llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDE/MB - SAP Consultant - functional output (M/F/D)
job.description: Responsibilities: You will be responsible for ensuring the operation and project delivery across all phases you will execute business requirements engineering and ensure provisioning of standard IT features - You will do error analysis and corrections of Incident and Problems (Provide 2nd and/or 3rd level support). - As part of our agile development team you will work on user stories, do the development and testing of new features. - With your extensive experience on the subject matter, you will guide, coach and train other team members build competencies for the respective modules. - You will be assigned projects where you will have end to end responsibility for all deliverables Qualifications: SAP SD / Order‑to‑Cash functional expertise, including strong SD customizing and process knowledge. Experience in S/4HANA environments with 6+ years working on complex SAP applications. SAP Output Management know‑how, especially Adobe Forms (creation, maintenance, troubleshooting). Integration cross‑module awareness, e.g., collaboration with technical consultants and familiarity with adjacent modules (MM / FI / TM) and optionally BTP Fiori.Agile DevOps mindset with hands‑on experience in Scrum, self‑organized work, user stories, testing documentation. What we offer: Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work environment where your ideas are valued, and your curiosity and ambition are encouraged. Benefit from flexible working models, international networking, and a strong sense of purpose as we enable our customers’ green transformation and lead the way in digital excellence. [to include specific local benefits].
